data.lean: lemma example1 (x y z : mynat) : x * y + z = x * y + z :=
data.editorText: refl,

data.lean: lemma example2 (x y : mynat) (h : y = x + 7) : 2 * y = 2 * (x + 7) :=
data.editorText:
rw h,
refl,

data.lean: lemma example3 (a b : mynat) (h : succ a = b) : succ(succ(a)) = succ(b) :=
data.editorText:
rw ← h,
refl,

data.lean: lemma add_succ_zero (a : mynat) : a + succ(0) = succ(a) :=
data.editorText:
rw add_succ,
rw add_zero,
refl,

data.lean: lemma zero_add (n : mynat) : 0 + n = n :=
data.editorText:
induction n with a ha,
rw add_zero,
refl,
rw add_succ,
rw ha,
refl

data.lean: lemma add_assoc (a b c : mynat) : (a + b) + c = a + (b + c) :=
data.editorText:
induction c with d hc,
rw add_zero,
rw add_zero,
refl,
rw add_succ,
rw hc,
rw add_succ,
rw add_succ,
refl

data.lean: lemma succ_add (a b : mynat) : succ a + b = succ (a + b) :=
data.editorText:
induction b with d hb,
rw add_zero,
rw add_zero,
refl,
rw add_succ,
rw hb,
rw add_succ,
refl

data.lean: lemma add_comm (a b : mynat) : a + b = b + a :=
data.editorText:
induction b with d hb,
rw add_zero,
rw zero_add,
refl,
rw add_succ,
rw hb,
rw succ_add,
refl

data.lean: theorem succ_eq_add_one (n : mynat) : succ n = n + 1 :=
data.editorText:
rw one_eq_succ_zero,
rw add_succ,
rw add_zero,
refl

data.lean: lemma add_right_comm (a b c : mynat) : a + b + c = a + c + b :=
data.editorText:
induction c with d hc,
rw add_zero,
rw add_zero,
refl,
rw add_succ,
rw hc,
rw add_succ,
rw succ_add,
refl

data.lean: lemma zero_mul (m : mynat) : 0 * m = 0 :=
data.editorText:
induction m with o hm,
rw mul_zero,
refl,
rw mul_succ,
rw add_zero,
exact hm

data.lean: lemma mul_one (m : mynat) : m * 1 = m :=
data.editorText:
rw one_eq_succ_zero,
rw mul_succ,
rw mul_zero,
rw zero_add,
refl

data.lean: lemma one_mul (m : mynat) : 1 * m = m :=
data.editorText:
induction m with o hm,
rw mul_zero,
refl,
rw mul_succ,
rw hm,
rw succ_eq_add_one,
refl

data.lean: lemma mul_add (t a b : mynat) : t * (a + b) = t * a + t * b :=
data.editorText:
induction b with d hb,
rw mul_zero,
rw add_zero,
rw add_zero,
refl,
rw add_succ,
rw mul_succ,
rw hb,
rw mul_succ,
rw add_assoc,
refl

data.lean: lemma mul_assoc (a b c : mynat) : (a * b) * c = a * (b * c) :=
data.editorText:
induction c with d hc,
repeat {rw mul_zero},
rw mul_succ,
rw hc,
rw mul_succ,
rw mul_add,
refl

data.lean: lemma succ_mul (a b : mynat) : succ a * b = a * b + b :=
data.editorText:
induction b with d hb,
rw add_zero,
repeat {rw mul_zero},
rw mul_succ,
rw add_succ,
rw hb,
symmetry,
rw add_succ,
rw mul_succ,
rw add_right_comm,
refl

data.lean: lemma add_mul (a b t : mynat) : (a + b) * t = a * t + b * t :=
data.editorText:
induction t with d ht,
rw mul_zero,
repeat {rw mul_zero},
rw add_zero,
refl,
rw mul_succ,
rw ht,
rw add_assoc,
symmetry,
repeat {rw mul_succ},
rw add_right_comm,
rw add_assoc,
rw add_right_comm,
rw add_assoc,
refl

data.lean: lemma mul_comm (a b : mynat) : a * b = b * a :=
data.editorText:
induction b with d hb,
rw mul_zero,
rw zero_mul,
refl,
rw mul_succ,
rw succ_mul,
rw hb,
refl

data.lean: lemma mul_left_comm (a b c : mynat) : a * (b * c) = b * (a * c) :=
data.editorText:
induction c with d hc,
repeat {rw mul_zero},
rw mul_succ,
rw add_comm,
rw mul_add,
rw hc,
symmetry,
rw mul_succ,
rw add_comm,
rw mul_add,
rw mul_comm,
refl

data.lean: lemma zero_pow_zero : (0 : mynat) ^ (0 : mynat) = 1 :=
data.editorText:
rw pow_zero,
refl

data.lean: lemma zero_pow_succ (m : mynat) : (0 : mynat) ^ (succ m) = 0 :=
data.editorText:
rw pow_succ,
rw mul_zero,
refl

data.lean: lemma pow_one (a : mynat) : a ^ (1 : mynat) = a :=
data.editorText:
rw one_eq_succ_zero,
rw pow_succ,
rw pow_zero,
rw one_mul,
refl

data.lean: lemma one_pow (m : mynat) : (1 : mynat) ^ m = 1 :=
data.editorText:
induction m with o hm,
rw pow_zero,
refl,
rw pow_succ,
rw hm,
rw one_mul,
refl

data.lean: lemma pow_add (a m n : mynat) : a ^ (m + n) = a ^ m * a ^ n :=
data.editorText:
induction n with o hn,
rw add_zero,
rw pow_zero,
rw mul_one,
refl,
rw add_succ,
rw pow_succ,
rw hn,
rw mul_assoc,
symmetry,
rw pow_succ,
refl

data.lean: lemma mul_pow (a b n : mynat) : (a * b) ^ n = a ^ n * b ^ n :=
data.editorText:
induction n with m hn,
repeat {rw pow_zero},
rw mul_one,
refl,
rw pow_succ,
rw hn,
rw mul_assoc,
symmetry,
repeat {rw pow_succ},
rw mul_left_comm,
rw mul_assoc,
rw mul_left_comm,
refl

data.lean: lemma pow_pow (a m n : mynat) : (a ^ m) ^ n = a ^ (m * n) :=
data.editorText:
induction n with o hn,
rw mul_zero,
repeat {rw pow_zero},
rw pow_succ,
rw hn,
symmetry,
rw mul_succ,
rw pow_add,
refl

data.lean:
lemma add_squared (a b : mynat) :
  (a + b) ^ (2 : mynat) = a ^ (2 : mynat) + b ^ (2 : mynat) + 2 * a * b :=
data.editorText:
rw two_eq_succ_one,
rw one_eq_succ_zero,
repeat {rw pow_succ},
repeat {rw pow_zero},
rw one_mul,
rw mul_add,
rw add_mul,
rw add_mul,
rw mul_comm,
rw mul_comm,
rw add_assoc,
rw add_comm,
rw mul_comm,
rw add_comm,
symmetry,
rw one_mul,
rw one_mul,
rw succ_mul,
rw succ_mul,
rw zero_mul,
rw zero_add,
rw add_mul,
rw add_right_comm,
symmetry,
rw add_assoc,
rw add_assoc,
refl

data.lean: example (P Q : Type) (p : P) (h : P → Q) : Q :=
data.editorText: exact h(p)

data.lean: example : mynat → mynat :=
data.editorText:
intro h,
exact h

data.lean:
example (P Q R S T U: Type)
(p : P)
(h : P → Q)
(i : Q → R)
(j : Q → T)
(k : S → T)
(l : T → U)
: U :=
data.editorText: exact l(j(h(p)))

data.lean:
example (P Q R S T U: Type)
(p : P)
(h : P → Q)
(i : Q → R)
(j : Q → T)
(k : S → T)
(l : T → U)
: U :=
data.editorText: exact l(j(h(p)))

data.lean: example (P Q : Type) : P → (Q → P) :=
data.editorText:
intro h,
intro h',
exact h

data.lean: example (P Q R : Type) : (P → (Q → R)) → ((P → Q) → (P → R)) :=
data.editorText:
intro hr,
intro hq,
intro hp,
apply hr,
exact hp,
apply hq,
exact hp

data.lean: example (P Q F : Type) : (P → Q) → ((Q → F) → (P → F)) :=
data.editorText:
intro hpq,
intro hqf,
intro hp,
exact hqf(hpq(hp))

data.lean: example (P Q : Type) : (P → Q) → ((Q → empty) → (P → empty)) :=
data.editorText:
intro hpq,
intro hq0,
intro hp,
exact hq0(hpq(hp))

data.lean:
example (A B C D E F G H I J K L : Type)
(f1 : A → B) (f2 : B → E) (f3 : E → D) (f4 : D → A) (f5 : E → F)
(f6 : F → C) (f7 : B → C) (f8 : F → G) (f9 : G → J) (f10 : I → J)
(f11 : J → I) (f12 : I → H) (f13 : E → H) (f14 : H → K) (f15 : I → L)
 : A → L :=
data.editorText:
intro a,
exact f15(f11(f9(f8(f5(f2(f1(a)))))))

data.lean: example (P Q : Prop) (p : P) (h : P → Q) : Q :=
data.editorText: exact h(p)

data.lean: lemma imp_self (P : Prop) : P → P :=
data.editorText:
intro hp,
exact hp

data.lean:
lemma maze (P Q R S T U: Prop)
(p : P)
(h : P → Q)
(i : Q → R)
(j : Q → T)
(k : S → T)
(l : T → U)
: U :=
data.editorText:
have q := h(p),
have t := j(q),
have u := l(t),
exact u

data.lean:
lemma maze (P Q R S T U: Prop)
(p : P)
(h : P → Q)
(i : Q → R)
(j : Q → T)
(k : S → T)
(l : T → U)
: U :=
data.editorText:
have q := h(p),
have t := j(q),
have u := l(t),
exact u

data.lean: example (P Q : Prop) : P → (Q → P) :=
data.editorText:
intro hp,
intro hq,
exact hp

data.lean: example (P Q R : Prop) : (P → (Q → R)) → ((P → Q) → (P → R)) :=
data.editorText:
intro hpqr,
intro hpq,
intro hp,
have hqr := hpqr(hp),
apply hqr,
apply hpq,
exact hp

data.lean: lemma imp_trans (P Q R : Prop) : (P → Q) → ((Q → R) → (P → R)) :=
data.editorText:
intro hpq,
intro hqr,
intro hp,
exact hqr(hpq(hp))

data.lean: lemma contrapositive (P Q : Prop) : (P → Q) → (¬ Q → ¬ P) :=
data.editorText:
intro hpq,
intro notq,
intro hp,
have q := hpq(hp),
contradiction

data.lean:
example (A B C D E F G H I J K L : Prop)
(f1 : A → B) (f2 : B → E) (f3 : E → D) (f4 : D → A) (f5 : E → F)
(f6 : F → C) (f7 : B → C) (f8 : F → G) (f9 : G → J) (f10 : I → J)
(f11 : J → I) (f12 : I → H) (f13 : E → H) (f14 : H → K) (f15 : I → L)
 : A → L :=
data.editorText:
intro a,
exact f15(f11(f9(f8(f5(f2(f1(a)))))))

data.lean: example (P Q : Prop) (p : P) (q : Q) : P ∧ Q :=
data.editorText:
split,
exact p,
exact q

data.lean: lemma and_symm (P Q : Prop) : P ∧ Q → Q ∧ P :=
data.editorText:
intro hpeq,
cases hpeq with hp hq,
split,
exact hq,
exact hp

data.lean: lemma and_trans (P Q R : Prop) : P ∧ Q → Q ∧ R → P ∧ R :=
data.editorText:
intro hpeq,
intro hqer,
split,
cases hpeq with hp hq,
exact hp,
cases hqer with hq hr,
exact hr

data.lean: lemma iff_trans (P Q R : Prop) : (P ↔ Q) → (Q ↔ R) → (P ↔ R) :=
data.editorText:
intro hpiffq,
intro hqiffr,
cases hpiffq with hpq hqp,
cases hqiffr with hqr hrq,
split,
intro hp,
exact hqr(hpq(hp)),
intro hr,
exact hqp(hrq(hr))

data.lean: lemma iff_trans (P Q R : Prop) : (P ↔ Q) → (Q ↔ R) → (P ↔ R) :=
data.editorText:
intro hpiffq,
intro hqiffr,
cases hpiffq with hpq hqp,
cases hqiffr with hqr hrq,
split,
intro hp,
exact hqr(hpq(hp)),
intro hr,
exact hqp(hrq(hr))

data.lean: example (P Q : Prop) : Q → (P ∨ Q) :=
data.editorText:
intro hq,
right,
exact hq

data.lean: lemma or_symm (P Q : Prop) : P ∨ Q → Q ∨ P :=
data.editorText:
intro hpoq,
cases hpoq with hp hq,
right,
exact hp,
left,
exact hq

data.lean: lemma and_or_distrib_left (P Q R : Prop) : P ∧ (Q ∨ R) ↔ (P ∧ Q) ∨ (P ∧ R) :=
data.editorText:
split,
intro hpeqor,
cases hpeqor with hp hqor,
cases hqor with hq hr,
left,
split,
exact hp,
exact hq,
right,
split,
exact hp,
exact hr,
intro hpeqoper,
cases hpeqoper with hpeq hper,
cases hpeq with hp hq,
split,
exact hp,
left,
exact hq,
cases hper with hp hr,
split,
exact hp,
right,
exact hr

data.lean: lemma contra (P Q : Prop) : (P ∧ ¬ P) → Q :=
data.editorText:
intro h,
exfalso,
cases h with hp and notp,
contradiction

data.lean: lemma contrapositive2 (P Q : Prop) : (¬ Q → ¬ P) → (P → Q) :=
data.editorText:
intro hnot,
intro hp,
by_cases Q,
exact h,
exfalso,
have _p := hnot(h),
contradiction

data.lean: theorem succ_inj' {a b : mynat} (hs : succ(a) = succ(b)) :  a = b :=
data.editorText: exact succ_inj(hs)

data.lean: theorem succ_succ_inj {a b : mynat} (h : succ(succ(a)) = succ(succ(b))) :  a = b :=
data.editorText:
have hh := succ_inj(h),
exact succ_inj(hh)

data.lean: theorem succ_eq_succ_of_eq {a b : mynat} : a = b → succ(a) = succ(b) :=
data.editorText:
intro h,
rw h,
refl

data.lean: theorem succ_eq_succ_iff (a b : mynat) : succ a = succ b ↔ a = b :=
data.editorText:
split,
intro hsucc,
exact succ_inj(hsucc),
intro h,
exact succ_eq_succ_of_eq(h)

data.lean: theorem add_right_cancel (a t b : mynat) : a + t = b + t → a = b :=
data.editorText:
intro h,
induction t with d ht,
rw add_zero at h,
rw add_zero at h,
exact h,
rw add_succ at h,
rw add_succ at h,
have hh := succ_inj(h),
exact ht(hh)

data.lean: theorem add_left_cancel (t a b : mynat) : t + a = t + b → a = b :=
data.editorText:
intro h,
symmetry at h,
rw add_comm at h,
symmetry at h,
rw add_comm at h,
exact add_right_cancel a t b (h)

data.lean: theorem add_right_cancel_iff (t a b : mynat) :  a + t = b + t ↔ a = b :=
data.editorText:
split,
intro h,
exact add_right_cancel a t b (h),
intro h',
induction t with d ht,
rw add_zero,
rw add_zero,
exact h',
rw add_succ,
rw add_succ,
rw h',
refl

data.lean: lemma eq_zero_of_add_right_eq_self {a b : mynat} : a + b = a → b = 0 :=
data.editorText:
intro h,
induction a with d ha,
rw zero_add at h,
exact h,
rw succ_add at h,
exact ha(succ_inj(h))

data.lean: theorem succ_ne_zero (a : mynat) : succ a ≠ 0 :=
data.editorText:
symmetry,
exact zero_ne_succ a

data.lean: lemma add_left_eq_zero {{a b : mynat}} (H : a + b = 0) : b = 0 :=
data.editorText:
cases b with d,
refl,
rw add_succ at H,
exfalso,
have hd := succ_ne_zero (a+d),
contradiction

data.lean: lemma add_right_eq_zero {a b : mynat} : a + b = 0 → a = 0 :=
data.editorText:
rw add_comm,
intro h,
exact add_left_eq_zero (h)

data.lean: theorem add_one_eq_succ (d : mynat) : d + 1 = succ d :=
data.editorText:
rw succ_eq_add_one,
refl

data.lean: lemma ne_succ_self (n : mynat) : n ≠ succ n :=
data.editorText:
intro h,
induction n with m hm,
exact zero_ne_succ 0 h,
have hboom := succ_inj (h),
exact hm(hboom)

data.lean: theorem le_of_succ_le_succ (a b : mynat) : succ a ≤ succ b → a ≤ b :=

theorem add_le_add_left {a b : mynat} (h : a ≤ b) (t : mynat) :

data.lean: lemma lt_aux_one (a b : mynat) : a ≤ b ∧ ¬ (b ≤ a) → succ a ≤ b :=
